response.overview: A post-societal Texas, where the frozen thickets are roamed by Survivors, Scavengers, Thieves, and Killers. A grizzled crew venture into the Black Zone, an exceedingly dangerous area shrouded in mystery. Treasure calls from the depths of the zone; "Salvation" or "Doom".
response.tagline: Treasure calls from the depths of the zone; "Salvation"  or  "Doom"
response.title: The Marked Room
